JUDGE BENSON, BETH WILBER - CLERK, MARCIA HOLMES - REPORTER 3PM, C/C FOR SETT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, STIPJ ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARPER, MACARTHUR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 809 BRODERICK ST., STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DAMAGE IN THE SUM OF $1183.26; DAMAGES WAIVED IF DEFT. VACATES PREMISES BY 12AM, 15-OCT-94; NO FURTHER STAYS; PLTF. TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS; (SEE FILE FOR DETAIL)
